title: France Clears Cruise Ship to Sail After Norovirus Outbreak Sickens Dozens
summary_full: The ship’s 1,700 passengers had been prevented from disembarking to Bordeaux for hours while officials investigated a wave of illness on board.
summary_public: The ship’s 1,700 passengers had been prevented from disembarking to Bordeaux for hours while officials investigated a wave of illness on board.
